# Wiki

A markdown-based knowledge base for procedures, equipment guides, and community documentation.

[← Back to features](README.md)

## Reading

All members can read wiki content. Pages support:

- Hierarchical directory structure with nested pages
- Markdown rendering including tables, code blocks, and Mermaid diagrams
- Image uploads embedded in page content

## Editing

Mentors and admins can:

- Create, edit, and organise pages
- Manage the directory structure
- View version history and previous revisions of any page

## Permissions

Wiki editing requires the **Mentor** tag or **admin** role. See [Roles and permissions](roles-and-permissions.md).
